name: pi-lsp-servers
description: Language servers used by the pi lsp extension. Installed here so nothing pollutes the global environment and versions stay pinned.

comments.typescript: Pinned to 5.x deliberately. TypeScript 7.0.x dropped the tsserver binary (its bin field is only tsc), and typescript-language-server drives tsserver — installing typescript@latest silently breaks TS/JS diagnostics.
comments.pyright: Ships both pyright and pyright-langserver; the extension uses pyright-langserver --outputjson --stdio.
comments.gopls: Not an npm package. Install with: GOBIN=~/.pi/agent/lsp/bin go install golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest — or leave it on PATH.
comments.jdtls: Eclipse JDT language server is not installed here (100MB+). The registry entry resolves it from PATH if you install it, e.g. brew install jdtls.
